final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of a minimalist Nordic living room scene.

Style/medium: needs a minimalist Nordic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a grey fabric sofa, green plants, and a floor lamp
Scene/backdrop: must include white walls, light wood flooring, and large windows with sunlight streaming in
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, warm, and cozy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean and bright direction — exact values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
